sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61605, Lot 23226 — Ancients
Galerius, as Caesar (AD 305-311). AE follis or BI nummus (26mm, 5h). NGC MS, Silvering. Heraclea, 1st officina, ca. AD 296. GAL VAL MAXIMIANVS NOB CAES, laureate head of Galerius right / GENI
sales.description:
Ancients
Galerius, as Caesar (AD 305-311). AE follis or BI nummus (26mm, 5h). NGC MS, Silvering. Heraclea, 1st officina, ca. AD 296. GAL VAL MAXIMIANVS NOB CAES, laureate head of Galerius right / GENIO POPV-L-I ROMANI, Genius standing facing, modius on head left, nude save for chlamys over left shoulder, pouring liquors from patera in outstretched right hand, cornucopia cradled in left arm; HTA in exergue. RIC VI 18b.

Galerius Valerius Maximianus became Caesar in AD 293 under Diocletian, foll...
